Implemented apps/cockpit-daemon/src/transport/websocket.ts: DaemonTransport class with client_hello, event_batch, event_batch_ack, client_heartbeat, server_hello, exponential backoff reconnect, buildWsUrl helper
Implemented apps/cockpit-daemon/src/daemon.ts: runDaemon() main loop with config loading, SQLite DB, initial reconcile, DaemonTransport, 60s periodic reconcile, SIGINT/SIGTERM graceful shutdown
Updated apps/cockpit-daemon/src/cli.ts: wired handleDaemon to call runDaemon() from daemon.ts instead of the stub
Updated apps/cockpit-daemon/package.json: added ws dependency, added websocket.test.ts to test script

Fixed tests: replaced once('message') with lossless MessageQueue class to prevent dropped messages when consecutive frames arrive in same TCP segment. Fixed afterEach cleanup order (stop transports before closing servers). Removed stray double-nested test file.
Final verification: 60/60 tests pass (pnpm test), npx tsc --noEmit clean, all 16 websocket transport tests pass

All deliverables are complete and verified:
